summary: ChurnDiary is a personal subscription cancellation ledger for individual users. After signing in, you log every subscription you've cancelled — recording the service name, cancellation date, money saved, qualitative reason you left, and your mood at the time. You can also log upcoming free trials with a conversion date; the app runs a daily background job and sends you an email reminder 7 days before any trial converts, so you never get silently charged. A personal stats bar aggregates your cancellation history. Public share links let you share your cancellation diary with friends. Core product is completely free to use.

newSqlTables.name: cancellation_entries
newSqlTables.purpose: Stores each subscription cancellation log: service name, cancel date, monthly cost saved, qualitative reason, mood rating, and optional notes. Scoped per user.

newSqlTables.name: trial_entries
newSqlTables.purpose: Stores free trial log entries: service name, trial start date, trial conversion date, reminder_sent flag, and status (active/cancelled/converted). Scoped per user.

newSqlTables.name: notification_preferences
newSqlTables.purpose: Stores per-user email notification preferences: reminder_days_before (default 7), email_enabled boolean. UPSERTs to keep one row per user.

routeAnchoredCapabilities.statement: Log a subscription cancellation with service name, cancel date, monthly cost saved, qualitative reason, and mood rating — building your personal cancellation ledger.
Log an upcoming free trial with its conversion date; the app emails you 7 days before the trial converts so you never get silently charged.
View a personal stats bar summarising total monthly savings, cancellation count, and active trials being watched.
Edit or delete any cancellation or trial entry to keep your ledger accurate.
Share a public read-only view of your cancellation diary via a unique link — no login required for visitors.
Configure trial reminder email preferences (days-before threshold, enable/disable) from the Notifications settings tab.

screens.name: Home — ChurnDiary Ledger
screens.purpose: Primary logged-in surface. Shows a stats bar (total cancelled, total monthly savings, active trials watched). Two tab sections below: Cancellations list and Active Trials list. Persistent '+ Log Cancellation' and '+ Add Trial' header CTAs always visible. Empty states link to the same create routes. Mobile-first card layout.

screens.name: Log Cancellation
screens.purpose: Create form for a new cancellation entry. Fields: service name, cancel date, monthly cost saved, reason (select), mood (select 1–5), optional notes. Submit button 'Log Cancellation'. Back-link breadcrumb to /home.

screens.name: Cancellation Detail
screens.purpose: Read-only detail page for a single cancellation. Shows all fields, a 'Copy share link' button, Edit and Delete actions. Breadcrumb back to /home.

screens.name: Edit Cancellation
screens.purpose: Edit form pre-filled with existing cancellation data. Same fields as create. Submit 'Save Changes'. Breadcrumb back to detail page.

screens.name: Add Trial
screens.purpose: Create form for a free trial entry. Fields: service name, trial start date, trial conversion date, optional notes. Submit 'Add Trial'. Back-link breadcrumb to /home.

screens.name: Trial Detail
screens.purpose: Detail page for a trial entry. Shows dates, countdown to conversion, reminder status, notes, status badge. Actions: Mark as Cancelled, Mark as Converted, Edit, Delete. Breadcrumb back to /home.

screens.name: Edit Trial
screens.purpose: Edit form pre-filled with existing trial data. Same fields as create plus status select. Submit 'Save Changes'. Breadcrumb back to trial detail.

screens.name: Public Cancellation Diary
screens.purpose: Unauthenticated public page at /share/[token]. Shows owner's cancellation entries (service name, reason, mood, date) in card layout. No cost data shown. Footer link to /auth/sign-up.

screens.name: Notification Settings
screens.purpose: Settings tab at /settings/notifications. Form to configure email reminders enabled (checkbox) and days-before threshold (number, default 7). Save Changes button with explanatory copy about the trial watchdog emails.

primaryUserFlow.title: Sign up / sign in
primaryUserFlow.detail: User visits the app and signs in via Google OAuth or email. On first login they land on /home with empty cancellation and trial lists.

primaryUserFlow.title: Log a cancellation
primaryUserFlow.detail: User clicks '+ Log Cancellation' in the persistent header (always visible), lands on /home/cancellations/new, fills in the form, clicks 'Log Cancellation'. Redirected to /home where the new entry appears in the Cancellations list.

primaryUserFlow.title: View cancellation detail
primaryUserFlow.detail: User clicks a cancellation row, navigates to /home/cancellations/[id]. Page includes a breadcrumb back to /home, Edit and Delete buttons, and a 'Copy share link' button that copies the public /share/[token] URL to clipboard.

primaryUserFlow.title: Log a free trial
primaryUserFlow.detail: User clicks '+ Add Trial' in the persistent header, lands on /home/trials/new, enters service name and dates, clicks 'Add Trial'. Redirected to /home where the trial appears in the Active Trials list with a countdown badge.

primaryUserFlow.title: Receive 7-day trial reminder
primaryUserFlow.detail: A daily background job checks all active trials. When a trial's conversion date is within the user's configured reminder window and reminder_sent is false, the job sends a Resend email and sets reminder_sent=true.

primaryUserFlow.title: Mark trial outcome
primaryUserFlow.detail: User visits /home/trials/[id] and clicks 'Mark as Cancelled' or 'Mark as Converted' to update the trial status.

primaryUserFlow.title: Edit or delete an entry
primaryUserFlow.detail: From any detail page the user clicks Edit, updates fields, and saves. The Delete button (with confirmation modal) removes the row and redirects to /home.

primaryUserFlow.title: Share cancellation diary
primaryUserFlow.detail: User clicks 'Copy share link' on a cancellation detail page. The /share/[token] link is copied to clipboard and is accessible to unauthenticated visitors.

primaryUserFlow.title: Configure notification preferences
primaryUserFlow.detail: User navigates to /settings/notifications, toggles email reminders on/off and adjusts the days-before threshold, then clicks 'Save Changes'. The background job reads these preferences when evaluating reminder timing.

capabilityBullets: Log subscription cancellations with service name, cancel date, monthly cost saved, reason (preset options), and mood rating (1–5)
Log free trials with start date and conversion date to trigger the 7-day email watchdog reminder
Daily background job checks active trials and emails you via Resend 7 days before conversion — sets reminder_sent to prevent duplicates
Personal stats bar on /home: total cancellations logged, total monthly savings, active trials being watched
Cancellations list and Active Trials list on /home with persistent header CTAs in both empty and populated states
Cancellation detail page with Edit, Delete, and 'Copy share link' actions
Trial detail page with Mark as Cancelled and Mark as Converted status transitions, Edit, and Delete
Public read-only /share/[token] page showing your cancellation diary to unauthenticated visitors (no cost data exposed)
Notification preferences settings tab: toggle email reminders on/off and configure days-before threshold (default 7)
Mobile-first responsive card layouts throughout — readable on narrow screens with no clipped controls
outOfScope: Paid app subscription or freemium paywall — core product is entirely free
Stripe checkout for app access, /billing route, or requireActiveSubscription gates
Automatic subscription detection via bank or Plaid integration
Importing cancellation history from external services
Custom domain or white-label diary pages
Team or household multi-user shared ledgers
Budget tracking or net-worth dashboards beyond basic monthly savings sum
dataAndIntegrations: cancellation_entries table: id, user_id (FK → user.id), service_name text, cancel_date date, monthly_cost_saved numeric nullable, reason text (price/quality/unused/found_better/other), reason_notes text nullable, mood smallint (1–5), share_token text unique nullable, created_at timestamptz

trial_entries table: id, user_id (FK → user.id), service_name text, trial_start_date date, trial_conversion_date date, notes text nullable, status text (active/cancelled/converted default active), reminder_sent boolean default false, created_at timestamptz
notification_preferences table: id, user_id (FK → user.id, unique), email_enabled boolean default true, reminder_days_before smallint default 7, updated_at timestamptz

Background job (cron 0 8 * * *): queries trial_entries WHERE status='active' AND reminder_sent=false AND trial_conversion_date <= CURRENT_DATE + (reminder_days_before || ' days')::interval; sends one Resend email per matching row then sets reminder_sent=true; errors written to app_events
Resend email (platform/founder credentials, byok=false): trial conversion reminder and trial creation confirmation emails sent server-side
share_token on cancellation_entries: nanoid generated server-side on first 'Copy share link' click; /share/[token] resolves to the owner's full cancellation list
GET /api/settings/notifications returns current notification_preferences row for form pre-fill; POST /api/settings/notifications upserts the row

externalApiIntegrations.intent: Send transactional trial watchdog reminder emails and trial creation confirmations using platform Resend credentials

backgroundJobs.intent: Daily job at 08:00 UTC: find active trials within each user's reminder_days_before window, send one Resend reminder email per trial, set reminder_sent=true to prevent duplicate sends

emailNotifications.intent: Resend-backed transactional emails: configurable-day trial conversion reminder sent by background job; trial creation confirmation sent on new trial log

fields.name: reasonNotes
fields.label: Any extra notes?
fields.placeholder: Optional details about why you left…

fields.name: mood
fields.label: How did you feel about cancelling?

fields.name: mood
fields.label: How did you feel about cancelling?

fields.name: emailEnabled
fields.label: Send email reminders before trials convert

fields.name: reminderDaysBefore
fields.label: Days before conversion to send reminder

featureContracts.title: 7-Day Trial Conversion Reminder Email
featureContracts.behavior: A daily background job (cron 0 8 * * *) queries all trial_entries WHERE status='active' AND reminder_sent=false AND trial_conversion_date <= (CURRENT_DATE + notification_preferences.reminder_days_before * INTERVAL '1 day'). For each matching row where email_enabled=true, the job calls sendEmail once with subject 'Your [serviceName] trial converts soon' and sets reminder_sent=true. A separate single sendEmail call fires immediately on POST /api/trials (trial_created trigger) to confirm the watchdog is active. Max 1 reminder email per trial (reminder_sent prevents duplicates). Resend failures are logged to app_events; the job continues processing remaining rows.
acceptanceCriteria: Given a trial with conversion_date = today + 7 and email_enabled=true, when the daily job runs, then exactly one reminder email is sent and reminder_sent becomes true
Given reminder_sent=true on a trial, when the job runs again, then no additional email is sent
Given email_enabled=false, when the job runs, then no email is sent even if within the reminder window
Given a new trial is submitted, then exactly one confirmation email is sent immediately via Resend
Given the Resend call fails, then the error is written to app_events and the job continues without crashing

featureContracts.title: Public Share Link for Cancellation Diary
featureContracts.behavior: When a user clicks 'Copy share link' on /home/cancellations/[id], the server checks cancellation_entries.share_token for that row. If null, it generates a nanoid token, writes it to share_token, and returns the full /share/[token] URL. The client copies the URL to clipboard via the Clipboard API. /share/[token] is a public Next.js route (no session required) that resolves the token to the owner's full cancellation_entries list. It renders service_name, reason, mood, and cancel_date for each entry but omits monthly_cost_saved. An invalid token renders a 404-style 'Diary not found' page.
acceptanceCriteria: Given no existing share_token, clicking 'Copy share link' writes a new token to the DB and copies the URL to clipboard
Given an existing share_token, the same URL is returned without a DB write
Given an unauthenticated visitor navigates to /share/[token], they see service_name, reason, mood, and cancel_date but no cost figures
Given an invalid token, /share/[token] renders a 'Diary not found' message
